5.5e.description: Subtract 1d4 from attack rolls and saving throws.

5e.description: Subtract 1d4 from attack rolls and saving throws.

5.5e.description: While a creature is blessed, whenever it makes an attack roll or saving throw, it must roll a d4 and subtract the number rolled from the result. Baned creatures also have disadvantage on ability checks made to resist effects that would move it.
